=== bd1997-02-20 Sendai Japan.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan and Band
20 February 1997
Sendai, Japan
Sun Palace

--------------------
lineage:  ? > data (Glyn's 97) vine dvd copy shns > harddrive > upload
comments:  not sure which LB this is.  jumping back to earlier in 97.  thanks to the artists, tapers, sharers!  
----------------------------
thanks to bjorner.com for this info, which matches tracklist of this torrent.
(disk 1)
1. Crash On The Levee (Down In The Flood)
2. The Man In Me
3. All Along The Watchtower
4. What Good Am I?
5. It Takes A Lot To Laugh, It Takes A Train To Cry
6. Silvio (Bob Dylan & Robert Hunter)
7. Friend Of The Devil (Jerry Garcia - Robert Hunter - John Dawson)
8. John Brown
9. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
10. Jokerman
(disk 2)
11. Ballad Of A Thin Man
12. Everything Is Broken

13. Like A Rolling Stone
14. It Ain't Me, Babe
15. Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35
Concert # 851 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 9 of the 1997 Tour of Japan. 1997 concert # 9
Concert # 37 with the 10th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Bucky Baxter (pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), John Jackson (guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), David Kemper (drums & percussion).
7-9, 14 acoustic with the band.
6, 7, 15 John Jackson & Bucky Baxter (backup vocal).
9 new songs (60%) compared to previous concert. 4 new songs for this tour.
Stereo audience recording, 120 minutes.
Session info updated 6 August 1997.
